sections.heading: What is Web Performance Fundamentals?
sections.body: Why performance matters, Core Web Vitals, and measuring speed. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Web Performance Fundamentals is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Web Performance Fundamentals is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Web Performance Fundamentals every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Web Performance Fundamentals implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Web Performance Fundamentals is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Web Performance Fundamentals is a core concept in fundamentals. Why performance matters, Core Web Vitals, and measuring speed. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
